revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:葦那陀迦神]]

| type = Shinto

|ignore =  is one of the 
{{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|goodbye $1/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.goodbye $1
| Name          = Ashinadaka no Kami
| Generation    = 
| Predecessor   = 
| Successor     = 
| Divine Order  = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}}
| Full Name     = 葦那陀迦神 (Ashinadaka no Kami)
| Alternate Name= 葦那陁迦神, 八河江比売, 八河江比賣, 八河江比売神, 矢川枝姫命
| Other Names   = 
| Divine Rank   = 
| Divine Role   = {{ill|Reed|ja|葦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reed|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヨシ|1=Phragmites australis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28557}} deity
| Mausoleum     = 
| father        = 
| mother        = 
| Relatives     = 
| consort       = {{ill|Kunioshitomi no Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunioshitomi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}
| children      = {{ill|Hayamikanotakesahayajinumi no Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamikanotakesahayajinumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| cult_centre        = {{Plainlist|
* {{ill|Asai Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|浅井神社 (高岡市福岡町赤丸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Shrine (Takaoka)|1=Asai Shrine (Takaoka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134925834}}
* {{ill|Yakawa Shrine|ja|矢川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakawa Shrine|1=Yagawa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11584115}}
* Yagō Shrine
}}
| Texts         = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}
}}
'''Ashinadaka no Kami''' (葦那陀迦神, アシナダカ) is a female deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|qid=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology|1=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview ==
Ashinadaka no Kami is mentioned in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}'' as the consort of {{ill|Kunioshitomi no Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunioshitomi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}. She is also referred to as '''Yagawaehime''' (八河江比売). She does not appear in the ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}''.
The name "Ashinadaka no Kami" translates to "Reed of Great Height," signifying both physical growth and symbolic prosperity. It is also associated with the purifying power of reeds and the flourishing of a nation's strength.{{Sfn|Kokugakuin University|url=https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/ashinadakanokami/|qq=}}
Her alternate name, "Yagawaehime," means "Priestess of Many River Shores," highlighting her role as a water deity with shamanistic qualities.{{Sfn|Shincho Japanese Classical Compendium|2014|qq=}}
At Yakawa Shrine, she is revered as a deity of arts and wish fulfillment, while at Yagō Shrine, she is associated with the management of waterside reeds.
== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Ashinadaka no Kami is the consort of {{ill|Kunioshitomi no Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunioshitomi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}, who is a descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}. Together, they bore {{ill|Hayamikanotakesahayajinumi no Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamikanotakesahayajinumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Shrines Dedicated ==
* '''Asai Shrine''' ({{ill|Fukuoka Town, Takaoka|ja|福岡町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuoka Town, Takaoka|1=Q11592436|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11592436}}, {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|qid=Q502988|lt=Takaoka City|1=Takaoka, Toyama}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|qid=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}) - Principal deity.
* '''Yakawa Shrine''' ({{ill|Kōka, Shiga|en|Kōka, Shiga|qid=Q847584|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka, Shiga}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}) - Enshrined as an auxiliary deity.
* '''Yagō Shrine''' ({{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|qid=Q844130|lt=Nagahama City|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Shiga Prefecture) - Principal deity.
